sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, data Map(String, UInt32));
SELECT mapReverseSort(map('key2', 2, 'key3', 1, 'key1', 3)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map;
UPDATE test_map SET data = mapReverseSort((k, v) -> v, data) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mapReverseSort(map('keyA', 5, 'keyB', 3, 'keyC', 8)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map;
